citation.description: File exists; search_files for 'Gerrit', 'module-size', and 'Serena' in templates/AGENTS.md returned no matches.

citation.description: BEGIN marker at line 24 ('<!-- BEGIN rebar-usage (generated; do not edit) -->') and END marker at line 97 ('<!-- END rebar-usage -->') delimit the region. templates/rebar-usage.md is the canonical source and its content matches the delimited region byte-for-byte.

criteria.criterion: The portable rebar-usage content is a delimited region byte-identical to a single canonical source.

citation.description: test_embedded_region_is_byte_identical_to_canonical() extracts only the delimited region and asserts byte-identity with canonical source. test_divergence_is_detected() (lines 84-90) is a self-test proving divergence detection. The test carries pytestmark=pytest.mark.unit; Makefile 'test' target runs 'pytest -m "not integration and not external"' which includes unit tests.

criteria.criterion: A drift-guard test compares ONLY the delimited region against the canonical source, fails on divergence (proven by a self-test), and runs under `make test`.
